title: RC Office Building
description: AI-generated reinforced concrete structural drafting package, 18000x12000mm, 3 stories.

details.title: Typical Isolated Footing Plan and Section
Typical Column Starter Bars and Ties

general_notes: All dimensions are in millimeters unless noted otherwise.
Concrete grade C30 assumed for MVP drafting package; engineer to verify.
Reinforcement cover: 75mm for footings, 40mm for columns/beams/slabs unless noted.
This package is generated for engineer review and coordination, not final sealed design.

assumptions: Rectangular reinforced-concrete frame inferred from prompt/design brief.
Support grid completed parametrically so beams and slabs have explicit supports.
Multi-story frame includes an RC core/shear-wall lateral system generated by the StructurAI engine.
